# ObviousBench Dataset Card

This card is a draft generated for the v0.1 release package.

## Snapshot

- Split: `paper_v1`
- Questions: 224
- Model/settings rows in the paper snapshot: 223

## Intended Use

Use this dataset to inspect a frozen obvious-question benchmark snapshot,
scoring policy, and static model/settings results.

## Limitations

- Do not mix this snapshot with the older 234-row, 80-question paper draft.
- Do not present reported Anthropic reasoning tokens as billed hidden-thinking cost.
- Do not claim a measured human baseline for v0.1; no human baseline is planned for this release.
